source: NSE official RSS (nsearchives.nseindia.com) — corporate announcements, not general market news

position_news.summary: Bajaj Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about Copy of Newspaper Publication under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 |SUBJECT: Copy of Newspaper Publication

Larsen & Toubro Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated July 08, 2026, titled "L&T Vyoma and Fortanix Partner to Deliver Confidential Computing with NVIDIA Technology". |SUBJECT: Press Release

Ina Dani has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. |SUBJECT: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
Adani Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'ESG Rating - Crisil'. |SUBJECT: Updates

Indian Overseas Bank has submitted the Exchange a copy Srutinizers report of  Annual General Meeting held on July 07, 2026. Further, the company has informed the Exchange regarding voting results. |SUBJECT: Shareholders meeting

Urban Enviro Waste Management Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Submission of Certificate under Regulation 13(3) of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 for the Quarter ended 30.06.2026'.'. |SUBJECT: Updates

La Opala RG Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Appointment of  Mr. Saradindu Dutta as an Additional Director designated as Non-Executive Independent Director of the Company for a term of five consecutive years commencing from July 8, 2026, subject to the approval of the shareholders at the ensuing 39th AGM of the Company. |SUBJECT: Appointment
